# Codex Rate Monitor v0.1.4

## What's Changed

- Enlarge the bottom-right overlay and row cards so larger user-selected fonts and reset times remain visible.
- Render usage labels and percentages with the same font size and baseline calculation for consistent alignment.
- Use compact `M.d HH:mm` reset dates in Simplified and Traditional Chinese environments.
- Sort the font selector alphabetically and use `Microsoft JhengHei UI` as the default font for new and reset settings.
